name: Famous Amos Chocolate Chip Cookies#2
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the butter or margarine, Crisco or corn oil, brown sugar, and sugar in a large bowl.
2. Add the eggs, baking soda, baking powder, salt, and vanilla to the mixture. Stir until well combined.
3. Gradually add the flour, flaked coconut, semi-sweet chocolate chips, and pecans to the dough. Mix until just combined.
4. Shape the dough into 1 1/2-inch balls and place them 2 inches apart on ungreased cookie sheets.
5. Bake at 375°F for 15 minutes.
6. Transfer the cookies immediately from the baking sheets to paper towels to cool.
7. These cookies freeze well either before or after baked.
